title: Genetic Testing and Screening - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Genetic Testing and Screening 7 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Breast Cancer Cervical Cancer Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions No Filter Breast Cancer Cervical Cancer Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details AMERICAN RED CROSS CASCADES REGION NORTHWEST OREGON CHAPTER DNA/RELATIONSHIP TESTING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Blood services test blood and swab samples to determine the probability of parentage. Can also do single-parent cases (child and alleged father). The paternity testing provided is American Association of Blood Banks (AABB) accredited and can be submitted in court. 3131 N Vancouver Avenue Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday 11am-7:30pm, Tuesday 11am-6:30pm, Wednesday 9am-5:30pm, Thursday 8am-3pm, Friday 6:30am-3:15pm, Saturday 6:30am-4:15pm, Sunday 6:30am-3:30pm Email (503) 528-5405 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ANY LAB TEST NOW ANY LAB TEST NOW EUGENE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides direct access to clinical lab tests, paternity and DNA, alcohol and other toxicology testing services. Test results should be discussed with a physician or healthcare provider. 19289 SW Martinazzi Avenue Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9am-6pm (541) 343-2398 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE OREGON CHILD SUPPORT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Child Support Program provides the following services: -Establishing paternity -Finding the noncustodial parent -Establishing a child support order or making changes to an existing support order -Coordination of children's health care coverage -Determining amount of past-due child support -Collecting and processing child support payments -Processing spousal support payments in certain situations The Child Support Program also assists employers to understand and comply with legal obligations, such as reporting new hires, withholding income, and enrolling dependents in medical insurance plans if available. 1162 Court Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: None Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5:15pm Email (503) 378-4400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a call-in center for family members of children and youth with special needs and chronic health conditions (developmental and emotional disabilities, behavioral problems, and chronic physical illnesses) and professionals who serve them. The center specializes in providing information and resources related to health information, health care access, and special needs systems and supports. All calls are confidential. Families may also request to be placed on an email list to receive monthly correspondence about issues of importance to children and youth with special needs in Oregon. 707 SW Gaines Street Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Family members of individuals age 26 and younger with special physical, emotional, behavioral, or mental health needs, including those who are at risk or suspected of having a special need. The child/youth does not have to have a diagnosed condition. Does not require documentation to prove citizenship to receive services. Hours: Message line available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (833) 990-9930 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breast and cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: -Age 18-39 and needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services -Must live or intend to live in Oregon - Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Men of any age with symptoms of breast cancer are eligible for breast and genetic services. United States citizenship is not required to participate in the ScreenWise program. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (971) 673-0581 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON GRANTS PASS WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a full range of Obstetric and Gynecological care. Services include contraceptives, menopause counseling and therapy, STD counseling and treatment, bladder surgery, premenstrual therapy, family planning, mother and infant care. 1075 SW Grandview Avenue Suite 200 Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female age 10 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm (541) 479-8363 Get Directions Visit Website More Details AMERICAN RED CROSS CASCADES REGION DNA/RELATIONSHIP TESTING SERVICES ANY LAB TEST NOW ANY LAB TEST NOW EUGENE OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE OREGON CHILD SUPPORT PROGRAM OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES
